name: SpaceUgh!
author: Poki
description: SpaceUgh! is an arcade skill game created by TastyAir. Serving as an homage to the classic Ugh!, this new spaceship controller simulation game offers a chance to play as a futuristic taxi driver who helps astronauts. Explore over 20 levels loaded with obstacles, opponents, power-ups and various strategic items. Spend your earnings on new rockets and upgradeable parts. SpaceUgh! is so exciting that it will sweep you off your feet. How to play: Control your rocket holding down the movement buttons and releasing them at the appropriate time. Move - WASD or Arrow Keys About the creator: SpaceUgh! was created by TastyAir. Play their other games for free on Poki : Electric Highway and Horror Nights Story .
